heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 11294 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Amendments1992— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), substituted “sections 11291 and 11293 of this title” for “this subchapter”, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 102–507
amendments: Amendments1992— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), substituted “sections 11291 and 11293 of this title” for “this subchapter”, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 102–507

children.label: a
children.text: To carry out sections 11291 and 11293 of this title, there are authorized to be appropriated $1,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1988 through 1991.

children.label: b
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 1992 through 1996, to carry out .section 11292 of this title
